verification_steps: MITRE: T1548 - Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism
MITRE: T1021 / T1059 - Remote Services / Command Interpreter
MITRE: T1486 - Data Encrypted for Impact
MITRE: T1041 - Exfiltration Over C2 Channel

attack_narrative: The attack originated from 185.220.101.45 targeting the target, gaining initial foothold through exploitation of a network-accessible service. Following injection, the compromised process established a covert C2 communication channel to 45.33.22.11 over HTTPS, with the TLS certificate issued by an unexpected authority — a hallmark of attacker-controlled infrastructure masquerading as legitimate services. The attack chain represents a complete APT intrusion lifecycle: obfuscated execution, process injection for persistence, and beaconing to external C2 infrastructure — consistent with a Cobalt Strike or similar commercial implant deployment.
containment_actions: BLOCK IP 185.220.101.45 at perimeter firewall and all internal segment boundaries
BLOCK IP 45.142.212.100 at perimeter firewall and all internal segment boundaries
BLOCK IP 45.33.22.11 at perimeter firewall and all internal segment boundaries
SUSPEND account 'admin' and invalidate all active sessions
PRESERVE all Sysmon, network, and endpoint logs for legal/forensic proceedings
NOTIFY CISO and legal team — assess breach notification obligations
